tool.name: SOPA Report
tool.command:
@CMD_UNZIP_ZARR@
## Run report generation sopa report input/spatialdata.zarr report.html --table-key '$table_key'

param.label: Key in SpatialData object containing the table to be used for report generation

has_text.text: The cells areas are obtained based on the 'cellpose_boundaries' boundaries (and its intrinsic coordinate system)

tool.help:
**What it does**
SOPA Report generates an interactive HTML quality control report for spatial omics data. The report provides comprehensive visualizations and statistics to assess data quality and processing results.
**More Information**
See the `SOPA report documentation <https://prism-oncology.github.io/sopa/tutorials/cli_usage/#pipeline-report>`_.
